findings.color: Existing royal-plum anchor with several low-contrast supporting tokens
findings.layout: Single-file multi-route dashboard with unbounded inline mission messages
findings.spacing: ad hoc values; normalized to a 4px scale
findings.runtime: Python standard library server and vanilla HTML/CSS/JS

constraints: Preserve existing routes and user changes
Mission controls must remain available on narrow viewports
Permission-gated actions must never be auto-approved
